added: deploy/ (Caddy, nginx, docker-compose, systemd) + docs/PUBLIC_DEPLOY.md + API key header support
added_attestation: Daily attestation (audit hashes) + attestation chain + optional Ed25519 signing + systemd timer/service
added_institutional: HMAC request signing + anti-replay + append-only audit hash chain + /v1/audit/chain
added_worm: MinIO compose + optional S3 uploader + systemd timer/service for daily snapshots
